company.name: Green Gujarat Natural Fertilizer
company.tagline: Grow with nature. Harvest with confidence.
company.address: 12, Bileshwar Industrial Estate-2, Opp. G.V.V.M., Kathwada Road, Odhav, Ahmedabad 382415, Gujarat, India

categories.name: Water-Soluble NPK Fertilizers
categories.description: 100% water-soluble mixture and complex fertilizers for foliar and fertigation application.

categories.name: Secondary Nutrient Fertilizers
categories.description: Calcium, magnesium and boron-based water-soluble fertilizers.

categories.name: Potassium Fertilizers
categories.description: Imported water-soluble potash and potassium-rich fertilizers.

categories.name: Sulphur Fertilizers
categories.description: Straight sulphur fertilizers in WDG powder form.

categories.name: Micro-Nutrient Fertilizers
categories.description: Zinc, iron, magnesium and boron sulphate-based micronutrients.

categories.name: Chelated Micro-Nutrients
categories.description: EDTA-chelated zinc, iron and calcium with superior absorption.

categories.name: Organic & Specialty Fertilizers
categories.description: ISO-certified organic manures, phosphogypsum and soil conditioners.

categories.name: Crop Protection
categories.description: Insecticides, fungicides and herbicides for integrated crop management.

products.name: Fertisol NPK 19:19:19
products.subtitle: 100% Water Soluble Mixture Fertilizer
products.dose: 5 g per litre (foliar) or 3–5 kg per acre (fertigation), weekly during vegetative phase.
products.benefits: A perfectly balanced NPK grade for vegetative growth. Universal application across all crops and growth stages.

products.name: Fertisol NPK 20:20:20
products.subtitle: 100% Water Soluble Mixture Fertilizer
products.dose: 2–3 g per litre for nursery and polyhouse fertigation; 5 g per litre as foliar.
products.benefits: Slightly higher concentration balanced grade — the preferred choice for nursery, polyhouse and greenhouse nutrition.

products.name: Fertisol NPK 13:40:13
products.subtitle: 100% Water Soluble Mixture Fertilizer
products.dose: 5 g per litre as transplant drench; 3–4 kg per acre fertigation for first 3–4 weeks after planting.
products.benefits: High phosphorus grade for early root establishment and transplanting. Drives strong taproot and tillering.

products.name: Fertisol Potassium Nitrate 13:00:45
products.subtitle: 100% Water Soluble · Chloride Free
products.dose: 5 g per litre foliar from flowering through harvest; 3 kg per acre weekly fertigation.
products.benefits: Chloride-free potassium nitrate for flowering, fruit set and grain fill. Essential for grape, pomegranate, tomato, mango and citrus.

products.name: Fertisol Mono Potassium Phosphate 00:52:34
products.subtitle: Water Soluble Complex Fertilizer
products.dose: 5 g per litre foliar pre-flowering; 3 kg per acre fertigation.
products.benefits: Nitrogen-free P+K grade for pre-flowering hardening and fruit colour development. Use when nitrogen is in excess.

products.name: Fertisol Mono Ammonium Phosphate 12:61:00
products.subtitle: Water Soluble Complex Fertilizer
products.dose: 3–5 kg per acre fertigation during early vegetative stage; 4–5 g per litre as foliar.
products.benefits: Highest-phosphorus water-soluble grade. Drives early root development and is the standard MAP for fertigation systems.

products.name: Fertisol Calcium Nitrate
products.subtitle: 100% Water Soluble Complex Fertilizer
products.dose: 2–3 g per litre foliar every 10–15 days from flowering; 5–10 kg per acre via fertigation.
products.benefits: Dual calcium + nitrate nitrogen source. Prevents blossom-end rot in tomato, tipburn in lettuce and improves fruit firmness.

products.name: Fertisol Calcium Nitrate with Boron
products.subtitle: Fortified Water Soluble Fertilizer
products.dose: 2–3 g per litre foliar every 10–15 days from flowering through fruit set.
products.benefits: Calcium nitrate fortified with boron — improves pollen viability, fruit set and prevents cracking. Standard for apple, grape, pomegranate and capsicum.

products.name: Fertisol Potassium Sulphate 00:00:50
products.subtitle: 100% Water Soluble Straight Potassic Fertilizer
products.dose: 3 kg per acre weekly fertigation pre-harvest; 5 g per litre foliar.
products.benefits: Chloride-free potassium for chloride-sensitive crops. The standard K source for grape, tobacco, citrus, mango and most vegetables.

products.name: Fertisol Potassium Schoenite 00:00:23
products.subtitle: 100% Water Soluble Straight Potassic Fertilizer
products.dose: 5 g per litre foliar; 5 kg per acre soil application.
products.benefits: Triple-action potassium + magnesium + sulphur. Single-product correction for the three most-deficient nutrients in fruit and vegetable crops.

products.name: Fertisol Magnesium 9.50%
products.subtitle: Magnesium Sulphate Tetrahydrate
products.dose: 5 g per litre foliar; 10–15 kg per acre soil application.
products.benefits: Corrects inter-veinal yellowing on older leaves — classic magnesium deficiency seen across vegetables, fruit crops and cereals on sandy soils.

products.name: Fertisol Sulphur 90% WDG
products.subtitle: Wettable Dispersible Granule
products.dose: 5–10 kg per acre as base application; 3 g per litre foliar.
products.benefits: Highest-grade elemental sulphur in WDG form — dissolves cleanly for foliar use. Critical for oilseed, pulse and allium crops.

products.name: Fertisol Zinc EDTA 12%
products.subtitle: Chelated Micro Nutrient Fertilizer
products.dose: 0.5–1 g per litre foliar; 0.5–1 kg per acre fertigation.
products.benefits: EDTA chelation keeps zinc available even in mildly alkaline soil. Essential for paddy, wheat, cotton, sugarcane and citrus.

products.name: Fertisol Iron EDTA 12%
products.subtitle: Chelated Micro Nutrient Fertilizer
products.dose: 0.5–1 g per litre foliar; 0.5–1 kg per acre fertigation.
products.benefits: Corrects iron deficiency chlorosis on neutral to mildly alkaline soils. Visible greening of new leaves within 3–5 days of foliar application.

products.name: Fertisol Calcium EDTA 12%
products.subtitle: Chelated Micro Nutrient Fertilizer
products.dose: 0.5–1 g per litre foliar from flowering through fruit fill.
products.benefits: Chelated calcium for direct fruit and leaf absorption — prevents blossom-end rot, tipburn and improves fruit storage life.

products.name: Fertisol Boron 20%
products.subtitle: Di-Sodium Octa-Borate Tetrahydrate
products.dose: 0.5–1 g per litre foliar at squaring and flowering.
products.benefits: High-concentration boron for pollen viability, fruit set and seed development. Critical for cotton, oilseed, pulse, garlic and onion crops.

products.name: Fertisol Zinc Sulphate Monohydrate 35%
products.subtitle: Micro Nutrient Fertilizer
products.dose: 20–25 kg per acre base application; 2 g per litre foliar.
products.benefits: High-purity zinc sulphate for soil base application. Standard correction for zinc-deficient paddy, wheat and maize fields.

products.name: Fertisol Magnesium Sulphate 30.5%
products.subtitle: Micro Nutrient Fertilizer
products.dose: 10–15 kg per acre soil; 5 g per litre foliar.
products.benefits: Soluble magnesium for mid-season correction. Restores chlorophyll on inter-veinally yellowed leaves within a week.

products.name: Fertisol Ferrous Sulphate 19%
products.subtitle: Micro Nutrient Fertilizer
products.dose: 10 kg per acre soil; 3 g per litre foliar.
products.benefits: Conventional ferrous sulphate for iron correction on acidic to neutral soils. Cheaper alternative to chelated iron for non-alkaline fields.

products.name: Sampurna Organic Manure (Base Grade)
products.subtitle: ISO 9001:2015 Certified Organic Manure
products.dose: 500 kg to 1 tonne per acre, broadcast and incorporated 2–3 weeks before sowing.
products.benefits: ISO-certified organic manure rich in organic carbon — builds long-term soil fertility, improves water-holding capacity and microbial life.

products.name: Sampurna Organic 20:10:10
products.subtitle: ISO 9001:2015 Certified Fortified Organic
products.dose: 100–200 kg per acre as base dose; supplements urea + DAP.
products.benefits: High-nitrogen organic-fortified grade — replaces part of conventional urea requirement while improving soil organic carbon.

products.name: Sampurna Organic 20:20:00
products.subtitle: ISO 9001:2015 Certified Fortified Organic
products.dose: 100–200 kg per acre as base dose at sowing.
products.benefits: Balanced N+P organic-fortified grade. Replaces DAP + urea combination while adding organic carbon to the soil.

products.name: Sampurna Organic 12:32:06
products.subtitle: ISO 9001:2015 Certified Fortified Organic
products.dose: 75–150 kg per acre at sowing or transplanting.
products.benefits: High-phosphorus organic grade — drives early root growth and establishment for transplanted vegetables, sugarcane and fruit crops.

products.name: Super Gold Phosphogypsum
products.subtitle: Ca + S + Mg + P Soil Conditioner
products.dose: 200–800 kg per acre depending on soil ESP. Apply 15–20 days before sowing and incorporate.
products.benefits: Reclaims sodic, saline and alkaline soils. Replaces sodium with calcium on clay exchange sites, restoring soil structure and water infiltration.

products.name: Super Gold 6-in-One Soil Conditioner
products.subtitle: Ca + Mg + S + Zn + B + P enriched
products.dose: 200–500 kg per acre, broadcast and incorporated before sowing.
products.benefits: Six-nutrient soil conditioner — addresses calcium, sulphur, magnesium, zinc and boron together. Ideal for vegetable, fruit and oilseed acreage.

products.name: Super Gold Phosphogypsum (Trial Pack)
products.subtitle: Trial / Small-Acreage Soil Conditioner
products.dose: 100–200 kg per acre for maintenance or trial application.
products.benefits: Smaller-value pack of the Super Gold phosphogypsum line — ideal for trial application or maintenance dose on already-reclaimed fields.

products.name: GGNF ESSER (Imazethapyr 10% SL)
products.subtitle: Selective Post-Emergence Herbicide
products.dose: 400–500 ml per acre in 200 L water, 15–20 days after sowing.
products.benefits: Selective post-emergence herbicide for soybean, gram, groundnut and pulses — controls grassy and broadleaf weeds without damaging the crop.

products.name: GGNF THILEM (Thiamethoxam 12.6% + Lambda Cyhalothrin 9.5% ZC)
products.subtitle: Dual-Action Systemic + Contact Insecticide
products.dose: 40–50 ml per acre in 200 L water.
products.benefits: Combines systemic (Thiamethoxam) and contact (Lambda Cyhalothrin) action — controls sucking and chewing pests in cotton, paddy, chilli and vegetables.

products.name: GGNF AZOTIX (Azoxystrobin 11% + Tebuconazole 18.3% SC)
products.subtitle: Broad-Spectrum Systemic Fungicide
products.dose: 200–300 ml per acre in 200 L water.
products.benefits: Dual-mode fungicide — strobilurin + triazole. Controls blast, sheath blight, blight, rust and powdery mildew across paddy, wheat, chilli, vegetables and grape.

products.name: GGNF EMA KILL (Emamectin Benzoate 5% SG)
products.subtitle: Lepidopteran-Specific Insecticide
products.dose: 80–100 g per acre in 200 L water.
products.benefits: Highly effective against caterpillars, bollworm, fruit borer, leaf folder, diamondback moth. Standard intervention for cotton bollworm and chilli fruit borer.

products.name: GGNF GGN MIDA (Imidacloprid 30.5% SC)
products.subtitle: Systemic Neonicotinoid Insecticide
products.dose: 60–80 ml per acre in 200 L water.
products.benefits: Systemic insecticide highly effective against sucking pests — aphids, whiteflies, jassids, leafhoppers. Long residual control across cotton, paddy, vegetables and pulses.
